word: G3832 - πανοικί - panoikí - pan-oy-kee' - With all his house

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: With all his house
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
with all (his) house, with (his) whole family
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Adverb from G3956 and G3624; with the whole family: - with all his house.
